name: kee-quill-social
description: A tiny eve agent that drafts on-brand social posts. The smallest possible keemakr Marketplace entry: one root agent, one tool, zero dependencies — instant install.

scripts.bundle: rm -f quill-social.zip && zip -r -q quill-social.zip agent entry.json agent.toml package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs README.md .nvmrc -x '*/.DS_Store' && echo 'wrote quill-social.zip' && unzip -l quill-social.zip
